description_long: This object is a kitchen knife with a straight, single-edged blade and a rectangular handle. The blade is metallic, slender, and tapers to a pointed tip, suitable for slicing or cutting tasks. The handle appears to be made of a dark, possibly plastic or composite material, and is ergonomically shaped for a secure grip. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on either the blade or the handle, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The transition between the blade and handle is smooth, with no visible guard or bolster. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of a standard kitchen utility knife.
description: A straight-bladed kitchen knife with a dark, rectangular handle and a pointed metallic blade, designed for practical cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade and the rectangular handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the blade and the width of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the straight blade and handle, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the thinness of the blade and the rectangular cross-section of the handle.
attribute_handle_design: rectangular, straight, dark plastic, smooth surface
